title: OfficeTree 12 x 10m Coloured Jute Twine 2mm - 12 Colours each 33'ft long - 3-Ply coloured Twine - Coloured String for Crafting or Gardening - Colourful String for Gift Wrapping
features: VERSATILE USE - OfficeTree 12x 10 metres (33 feet) of coloured jute twine 2mm is the perfect addition for DIY projects and crafts. Colourful cord for crafting decorations such as vase wraps, wall hangings or adding colour accents to baskets and flower pots. Their versatility allows for creative design possibilities in any project.

NATURAL - Jute cord 2mm made from high quality jute is biodegradable and environmentally friendly. The coloured cord set contains white, black, green, purple, dark green, pink, orange, red, lilac, light green, blue and light blue. Ideal as a tying cord for gardening, for tying plants together or as a rustic decoration for gift packaging.

ROBUST AND STRAPPABLE - The colourful jute craft twine is not only colourful, but also extremely hard-wearing. Craft cord jute retains its shape and strength and is ideal for craft projects such as weaving, knotting, macramé or DIY decor. It can be easily bent, knotted and processed.

CREATIVE - Colourful cord is ideal for textile projects. Use it as an accent for clothing, bags or accessories. The selection of colourful cords for braiding offers endless possibilities for creative braiding and design. As a decorative cord with vibrant colours, it offers a beautiful contrast and adds a special touch to any piece.

PERFECT FOR DECORATING - Colourful jute ribbon for weddings, parties or other events - this cord ribbon is an ideal decorative choice. Use as a table decoration, chair bow or garland to add a natural and colourful atmosphere to any occasion.
